Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Southern Comfort Underdeck | Deck & Porch Installations to get the job done right.

“Southern Comfort Underdeck built an amazing deck for our home in Midtown! They listened to our ideas and created a design that perfectly fits our style. The construction crew was professional and efficient, and the finished product is even better than we imagined. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Custom Deck Design & Build
Oct 26, 2024

“We hired Southern Comfort Underdeck to screen in our existing porch, and we're very happy with the results. The team was knowledgeable and helpful throughout the process. There were a couple of minor delays due to weather, but they communicated clearly and kept us informed. The porch is now our favorite spot to relax!”

David P. Porch Construction & Renovation
Sep 15, 2024

“We had an underdeck system installed to create a dry space under our deck, and it has made a huge difference! The quality of the materials and workmanship is exceptional. We can now use the space for storage and entertaining, even when it's raining. Great job!”

Jessica L. Underdeck Waterproofing Systems
Aug 2, 2024

“Our deck was in rough shape after years of neglect. Southern Comfort Underdeck did an excellent job repairing and restoring it. They replaced several damaged boards, repaired the railings, and applied a fresh coat of stain. It looks like new again! Thank you!”

Michael B. Deck Repair & Maintenance
Jul 10, 2024

“Southern Comfort Underdeck stained and sealed our deck, and it looks fantastic. They were prompt, professional, and paid attention to detail. The only reason I didn't give them 5 stars is that the price was a bit higher than other quotes we received, but the quality of the work was worth it.”

Emily K. Deck Staining & Sealing
Jun 20, 2024

“We needed to replace our old, wobbly deck railings, and Southern Comfort Underdeck provided excellent service. They helped us choose a new railing style that complements our home, and the installation was quick and efficient. We feel much safer now!”

Robert S. Railing Installation & Repair
May 12, 2024
Southern Comfort Underdeck | Deck & Porch Installations

Trusted deck builder professionals serving Atlanta, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
